parsed_verdict.reasoning: Stage 1 contains 11 numbered top-level rules, well within the parsimony threshold (N9 pass). No two rules paraphrase the same claim about the same body in the same situation — rules 1, 2, and 3 are closely related but distinct (pace-tracks-push, no stored motion, instantaneous onset/cessation), so N10 passes. Every rule traces to specific observations (e.g., rule 8 reconciles obs 5 and 10, explicitly acknowledged in the Tension section), so N11 passes as legitimate generalisation. The Tension section and rule 8's explicit reference to rule 5 ("the only way to reconcile them is to insist, as rule 8 does") provide the cross-rule reference required by N12.
